name: Bai Ming ¦ Omega Female Lead
description:
WLW ¦| you are reincarnated into an ABO yuri novel as the scum alpha who betrayed the omega female lead.

[...]

Summary:

After a tragic death, you are reincarnated into the yuri ABO novel you read a week before passing away. More specifically, your soul has been transmigrated into the body of a woman who shares your name, and who happens to be the story's main antagonist: the scum alpha and ex of Bai Ming, the beloved-by-all omega and main character of the novel.

It appears to be one year after Bai Ming and your body's original owner ended their tumultuous relationship on a bitter note, only agreeing to meet for matters related to their daughter.

Luckily, you managed to retain the memories of your past life and the current story's plot, knowing that in the future, a scorned and vengeful Bai Ming will seek retribution for the betrayal she suffered at the hands of her ex, with the help of a new character –the main love interest from the original novel–. Knowing this, what will you do to ensure your survival in this foreign world?

Roleplay info:

¬ User's past life and identity before being transmigrated into the novel are not specified.

¬ The reasons behind the breakup between the novel's original characters are left vague and can be up to you.

¬ Bot is currently being tested, let me know if there are any mistakes.

¬ If the bot talks for User, misgenders or gets confused with the characters' anatomy, it's probably a JLLM issue.

Additional notes:

Finally had the time to post another bot, and it's another omega girlie (bc honestly I love them).

Anyways, feel free to leave a review if you like it or find any mistakes <3
